citation_label: Revenu Quebec Schedule Q 2025 - Retirement Income Transferred to Your Spouse
heading: Revenu Quebec Schedule Q 2025 - Retirement Income Transferred to Your Spouse
body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule Q 2025 retirement income transferred to your spouse.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.Q-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule Q numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 50
Value: 0.50

Schedule Q applies where the taxpayer was born before January 1, 1961, had a spouse on December 31, 2025, and the spouses jointly decide to include a portion of the taxpayer's retirement income in the spouse's income. The note says that a transfer of retirement income must also transfer the corresponding Quebec income tax withheld from that income, and that only the person transferring retirement income encloses Schedule Q.

Part A calculates retirement income transferred to the spouse. Line 10 is the amount from TP-1 line 122, adjusted as instructed for retirement compensation arrangements. Lines 12, 13, 14 and 16 enter amounts included in line 10 that were used to purchase an annuity or transferred to an RRSP, RRIF or PRPP/VRSP, an unused PRPP/VRSP contribution refund deduction, a line 293 deduction for the line 10 amount, and a line 297 point 12 deduction for the line 10 amount. Line 18 adds lines 12 through 16. Line 20 subtracts line 18 from line 10. Line 22 is the retirement income transferred to the spouse on December 31, 2025, with a maximum of 50% of line 20. The taxpayer carries line 22 to TP-1 line 245 and the spouse enters the same amount on TP-1 line 123.

Part B calculates Quebec income tax withholding transferred to the spouse. Line 50 is Quebec income tax withheld from RL-2 box J on the income on line 20, including RL-1 box E for retirement compensation arrangement amounts. Line 52 is the amount from line 22 and line 53 is the amount from line 20. Line 58 multiplies line 50 by line 52 and divides by line 53. The taxpayer carries line 58 to TP-1 line 451.1 and the spouse enters the same amount on TP-1 line 451.3.
